title: Assemble Guns
body:
This mod requires https://modrinth.com/mod/a.v.a-alliance-of-valiant-arms-guns The mod adds a customizable firearm that you can address its functionalities and looks in different combinations.

 

 

 

How to play

You need to craft a prototype first (can be found in the A.V.A Crafting Table)

 

And then you shift-click an anvil with the gun

 

 

Choose different attachments on your gun!

 

The durability bar is the maintenance of the gun, as is the efficiency of some of the stats.

For example I have a gun that has durability 90 / 100, it means my accuracy, stability..etc is 90% efficient. Every shot has xx% (varies according to the capacity, (1000 / capacity)%) to decrease 1 durability, and different attachments give different quantity of durability,

Repair the durability using "Work Hardened Iron" at the anvil
